props.name: ひなた手账
props.gameplay_role: narrative_item — ひなた（丸山ひなた）の手帳，用于NPC对话场景和章节解锁叙事。静态展示道具，无交互功能。

variants.description: 手帐合上状态，正面封面可见——粉色系（#F0C4C4）布质封面，日文标题手写体，小蝴蝶结装饰，轻微做旧感
手帐翻开状态，展示两页内页——左页手绘小图（岛屿简图或角色素描），右页竖排日文手写文字，淡黄色纸质，温暖治愈

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor style. Cute Japanese pocket notebook (techo), closed, viewed from slight angle. Pink cloth cover (#F0C4C4), hand-lettered Japanese title '輝島日記', small bow ribbon decoration on corner, slight worn edges giving vintage warmth. Soft rounded corners, organic hand-drawn quality. Isolated on transparent background.
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: No pixel art, no 3D rendering, no neon, no pure black, no text cropping, no metallic sheen, no sharp geometric shapes, no photorealism, no background
prompt_contract.composition: Centered prop, slight 3/4 view angle, 180x240px canvas, subject fills 80% of canvas

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor style. Open Japanese techo notebook, two-page spread viewed from above. Left page has small watercolor sketch of island/coastline. Right page has vertical Japanese handwriting in warm ink, slightly imperfect lines. Warm cream/ivory paper (#F7EDD8), pages have natural slight curl. Soft pencil margin lines. Isolated on transparent background.
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: No pixel art, no 3D rendering, no neon, no pure black, no printed/digital typography, no metallic sheen, no sharp geometric shapes, no photorealism, no background
prompt_contract.composition: Centered open book spread, overhead view, 180x240px canvas, subject fills 85% of canvas

props.name: 灯塔灯
props.gameplay_role: chapter_6_restoration_centerpiece — 灯塔灯芯，章节6修复核心道具。作为UI进度展示元素和章节修复VFX的中心视觉锚点。8帧循环动画（旋转发光）。

variants.description: 帧1：灯芯正面，光束朝右上45度，金色光晕最强
帧3：旋转45度，光束朝右下45度
帧4：旋转90度，光束朝下，光晕最弱
帧5：旋转135度，光束朝左下45度
帧7：旋转225度，光束朝左上45度，光晕回升
帧8：旋转270度，回到近初始位置，完成360度循环

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor style. Lighthouse lamp housing, 8-frame rotation animation sequence. Fresnel lens assembly with golden rotating beam (#F5C842), warm glow emanating from center, glass panels with warm light refraction. Each frame rotates ~45 degrees. Frames show: rotating light beam sweeping clockwise, golden warm glow (#F5C842) as primary light, subtle soft radial halo. Isolated on transparent background, consistent scale across all 8 frames.
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: No pixel art, no 3D rendering, no neon, no pure black, no metallic chrome, no sharp geometric shapes, no photorealism, no background, no mismatched scale between frames
prompt_contract.composition: Each frame 256x256px, subject centered, beam clearly directional per frame, consistent anchor point across all 8 frames
